---
name: Bug Report
about: Something isn't working as expected
title: '[bug] '
labels: bug
assignees: ''

## Describe the bug

A clear description of what went wrong.

## Steps to reproduce

1. Run `portman ...`
2. See error

## Expected behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual behavior

What actually happened. Include the full terminal output.

## Environment

- OS: (e.g. Ubuntu 22.04, WSL2 on Windows 11)
- Bash version: (run `bash --version`)
- Python version: (run `python3 --version`)
- portman version: (run `portman version`)
- Forward type: k8s / ssh / socat / local

<summary>~/.portman/forwards.json</summary>

paste contents here
